testcase.name: Adding two numbers
Division by zero raises an error
Arithmetic operations with two operands -- @1.1 Basic arithmetic
Arithmetic operations with two operands -- @1.2 Basic arithmetic
Arithmetic operations with two operands -- @1.3 Basic arithmetic
Arithmetic operations with two operands -- @1.4 Basic arithmetic
Arithmetic operations with two operands -- @2.1 Edge cases
Arithmetic operations with two operands -- @2.2 Edge cases
Arithmetic operations with two operands -- @2.3 Edge cases
Square root of a positive number
Square root of a negative number raises an error
